overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a dimly lit institutional corridor with green emergency lighting, transitioning into a dressing room area featuring an illuminated vanity mirror and a mysterious standing figure. The footage exhibits high-quality atmospheric lighting typical of modern horror video games.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a slow walk down a narrow, dimly lit corridor illuminated by green emergency lighting. The camera approaches a metal shelving unit on the right and turns left toward an open doorway, revealing stacked boxes and a distant exit sign.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dressing room through the doorway, revealing a dramatic shift to a space dominated by a bright vanity mirror with bulbs on the left. A mysterious figure in white stands motionless near the back wall as the camera approaches, passing an upholstered chair and dressing counter.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, dimly lit institutional hallway into a starkly illuminated dressing room. It begins with a slow walk down a narrow corridor bathed in eerie green emergency lighting, passing a metal shelving unit before turning left toward an open doorway. As the camera crosses the threshold, the oppressive green hue shifts into the bright, focused glow of a vanity mirror lined with bulbs. The scene then expands into the dressing area, gliding past an upholstered chair and a counter toward a mysterious figure in white standing motionless against the back wall.
